introSection: Summer Coaster (Japanese: サマーコースター) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Teine Olympia in Teine, Sapporo, Hokkaido, Japan.
fullText:
Summer Coaster (Japanese: サマーコースター) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Teine Olympia in Teine, Sapporo, Hokkaido, Japan.



Yellow track and green supports.
